channel.title: DAINER Finance · Weekly
channel.description: A builder's weekly read on markets, picks, and capital. Free, no paywall.

item.title: Issue #001 — The launch — three reports, one dashboard, and a Leopold curveball
item.description: Launch issue. New home for the picks, the weekly read, and the math. v2 cuts 18 picks to 10 (8 singles + 2 ETFs). Leopold flipped to long/short barbell with $8.5B in NEW puts. Anthropic IPO not July — Q4 2026 target.
